generated_oml:
prefix DTDFVocab: http://www.example.org/DTDFVocab#
prefix base: http://www.example.org/base#
instance WiFiUDPDataTransmission : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom LidarPointCloudSensor, VehicleStateSensor, MotorActuationSignalSensor, SteeringServoSensor,
    base:desc "Raw sensor data transmitted via Wi-Fi using UDP protocol for inter-entity communication"
]
instance LidarPointCloudSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Raw LiDAR point cloud data from physical vehicle",
    DTDFVocab:producedData WiFiUDPDataTransmission
]
instance VehicleStateSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Vehicle speed, position, and other state metrics",
    DTDFVocab:producedData WiFiUDPDataTransmission
]
instance MotorActuationSignalSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor control signals sent to actuators",
    DTDFVocab:producedData WiFiUDPDataTransmission
]
instance SteeringServoSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Steering servo position and movement data",
    DTDFVocab:producedData WiFiUDPDataTransmission
]
instance VehicleStateDisplay : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time display of vehicle speed, position, and other state metrics"
]
instance ObjectTracksVisualization : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Visualization of detected and tracked objects from LiDAR data"
]
instance ProjectedDrivingPathDisplay : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Projected path of the vehicle based on current trajectory"
]
instance LeadVehicleDetection : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detection of lead vehicle using distance and speed data"
]
instance SpeedComputation : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Calculation of desired vehicle speed based on lead vehicle distance"
]
instance ActuationCommands : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Commands sent to vehicle actuators for throttle, brake, steering",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]
instance ACCEnableDisable : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Enable or disable Adaptive Cruise Control via UI",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]
instance DesiredSpeedSetting : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Set target speed for ACC system",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]
instance EmergencyBrakingCommand : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Immediate braking command issued by operator",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]
instance ThreeDVisualization : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "3D visualization component for real-time data display"
]
instance ControlPanel : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "User interface component for control inputs and system management"
]
instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring of vehicle state, object tracks, and projected driving path via user interface",
    DTDFVocab:provides VehicleStateDisplay, ObjectTracksVisualization, ProjectedDrivingPathDisplay
]
instance ComputationOffloadingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Offloads ACC computations (lead vehicle detection, speed calculation, actuation commands) to cloud resources",
    DTDFVocab:provides LeadVehicleDetection, SpeedComputation, ActuationCommands
]
instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Operator interface for enabling/disabling ACC, setting speed, and issuing emergency braking",
    DTDFVocab:provides ACCEnableDisable, DesiredSpeedSetting, EmergencyBrakingCommand
]
instance PointCloudClusteringTracking : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Software component for processing LiDAR point clouds into tracked objects",
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]
instance ISO23247DataTranslation : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Data serialization, message alignment, and unit conversion per ISO 23247 standard",
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]
instance ClusteredTrackedObjects : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Processed LiDAR data into clustered and tracked objects",
    DTDFVocab:fromData WiFiUDPDataTransmission,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PointCloudClusteringTracking
]
instance ISO23247TranslatedData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Serialized, aligned, and unit-converted data streams per ISO 23247",
    DTDFVocab:fromData WiFiUDPDataTransmission,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ISO23247DataTranslation
]
instance PhysicalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Physical twin entity deployed on 1/10-scale teleoperated vehicle hardware",
    base:contains LidarPointCloudSensor, VehicleStateSensor, MotorActuationSignalSensor, SteeringServoSensor
]
instance DigitalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Digital twin entity handling data processing and simulation",
    base:contains PointCloudClusteringTracking, ISO23247DataTranslation, DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService
]
instance UserEntity : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "User entity for monitoring and control operations",
    base:contains ThreeDVisualization, ControlPanel
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control signals (e.g., ACC commands, steering adjustments, motor actuation) are generated by the ACC Controlling FE, serialized, and converted by the ISO 23247 Data Translation component. These commands are transmitted over Wi-Fi using UDP to physical actuators, with real-time vehicle state feedback displayed in the 3D Visualization to confirm execution."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin system requires 100 ms clock synchronization accuracy for device coordination during computation offloading, as mandated by safety-critical vehicular application standards, with hardware limitations necessitating this specific timing constraint."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The architecture follows ISO 23247 RA, mapping software components to Function Entities (FEs) implemented as individual ROS2 packages, each containing one or more ROS2 nodes. Entities are deployed on distinct hardware, with the Physical Twin Entity deviating from the standard by hosting general automotive functionality (e.g., Point Cloud Clustering & Tracking) instead of resource-specific OME functions."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Communication between software components occurs within a ROS2 network, while inter-entity communication occurs over a Wi-Fi network using UDP in the transport layer. No additional details on network topology, bandwidth, latency, reliability mechanisms, or security protocols are provided in the document."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Compliant with ISO 23247 standard, which includes four parts covering overview, reference architecture, digital representation of physical manufacturing elements, and information exchange. Interoperability is achieved through OPC Unified Architecture (OPC UA) for data collection and device control."
]
